## What's changed

- Check GitHub Releases automatically in the background and from a new tray-menu action.
- Show a red update badge on the system-tray icon and usage overlay when a newer version is available.
- Display the new version's Release notes in a localized update window.
- Download the official Windows Release ZIP, verify it against `SHA256SUMS.txt`, update in place, and restart automatically.
- Preserve the existing executable path and `settings.json`, so desktop shortcuts and the Windows startup entry continue to work after updating.
